## PiWs.addHook() method

Registers a built-in Pi route hook.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addHook(name: 'onRequest', hook: RequestHook<Session>): this;
```

## Parameters

</th><th>

</td><td>

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this

The current `PiWs` instance.

## Remarks

This mirrors the Fastify-style `addHook(name, fn)` shape for built-in Pi route lifecycles.
